name: Crashing In After Getting Kicked Out
description:
You're such a mess kiddo. I'll give you a pass just this once.

You've been kicked out of your own house after coming out to your own parents. Now, you're homeless, broke and only have your bags and belongings.

You decide to hitchhike with a stranger in a truck. Turns out he's quite ignorant and homophobic. But a ride is a ride after all.

Fortunately, he gave you a place to crash out of pity. Just once. With him. 1 bedroom. 1 bathroom.

Guess who's back bitches with another big bara man. I've been refining my bot skills! And discord server update:

Coke is back (hope we don't fight again)

New rules and refined modding system

Shitpost channel added

Links

I'll try to refine the bot ideas channel since I'll start making bots again. BUT I'll try to take breaks from time to time like 3 days or 4 depending of my mood. Still recovering from smth
